Title: Governance, legal audit, source pinning
Objective: Establish GPL governance, exact source mapping, provenance and asset controls.
Exit Gate: GPL repo, dependency audit and provenance gates pass.

Title: NeoForge integration harness
Objective: Boot all mandatory mods together on client and dedicated server.
Exit Gate: Clean client/server boot and no classloading errors.

Title: Immersive EGO external subject API
Objective: Consume a stable NPC-facing EGO API with strict MIT/GPL isolation.
Exit Gate: Clean client/server boot and no classloading errors.

Title: Unified resident kernel
Objective: Create the canonical resident record, host adapters, persistence and repair.
Exit Gate: Persistence, repair and adapter tests pass.

Title: MineColonies civic bridge
Objective: Use colony, building, housing, job, request, warehouse, permissions and raid systems.
Exit Gate: Recruit, assign, request and reload scenario passes.

Title: MCA social bridge
Objective: Preserve identity, appearance, personality, relationships, family and age.
Exit Gate: No duplicate social graph and family persistence passes.

Title: Modern Companions military bridge
Objective: Generalize military roles, orders, equipment, XP, traits, morale and bond.

Title: Desert colony vertical slice
Objective: Prove all four pillars in one reproducible dedicated-server scenario.

Title: Unified jobs and professions
Objective: Add profession mapping, skills, schedules, readiness and apprenticeship gates.

Title: Resource requests and logistics
Objective: Add transaction-safe requests, warehouse access, couriers and reservations.

Title: NPC work recipes
Objective: Use existing workstations for data-driven resident production.
Exit Gate: Recipe, quality and rollback tests pass.

Title: Factions, cultures and reputation
Objective: Add culture, political faction, loyalty, grievances and reputation dimensions.
Exit Gate: Bounded economy and explainable reputation pass.

Title: Economy, trade and contracts
Objective: Add scarcity, barter, favor, debt, contracts and optional currency SPI.
Exit Gate: Bounded economy and explainable reputation pass.

Title: Defense, raids and command
Objective: Unify guards, militia, patrols, escorts, shelter and raid response.
Exit Gate: Combat policy and raid scenario pass.

Title: Households, family and education
Objective: Connect MCA family to homes, care, apprenticeship and migration.

Title: Governance, law, crime and migration
Objective: Add legitimacy, laws, justice, succession and civic movement.

Title: Crises and diplomacy
Objective: Create bounded emergent crisis chains and political relations.
Exit Gate: Crisis chains are bounded and recoverable.

Title: UI, configuration and performance
Objective: Finish dashboards, TOML profiles, simulation tiers and diagnostics.
Exit Gate: Performance budgets and config migrations pass.

Title: Hardening and release
Objective: Complete legal, migration, performance, compatibility and release gates.
Exit Gate: Reproducible jar/source release and matrix tests pass.
